name: File Search Pro
shortDescription: File Search Pro is a fast and efficient utility that helps users quickly locate files based on file extension, full file name, or partial file name matches. By specifying a search folder, the software scans the selected directory and its subfolders to display all matching files instantly. The search results can also be automatically saved to a text file for easy reference and reporting.
keybenefit: Unlike online file search tools, File Search Pro works completely on your local system, so your data never leaves your computer. There is no need to upload files or folder information to unknown websites, ensuring better privacy, security, and full control over your sensitive data.
features: Search using full or partial file names
Automatically saves search results to a text file
Works completely offline for enhanced privacy and security
No uploading of files or folder details to external websites
Ideal for organizing and locating files in large directories
Saves time by eliminating manual file browsing

faq.a: No. This is a premium utility
Yes. Internet is not required after download.
